en.text: Superiority of the Fajr (early morning) prayer in congregation.

ar.text: باب فَضْلِ صَلاَةِ الْفَجْرِ فِي جَمَاعَةٍ
قَالَ شُعَيْبٌ وَحَدَّثَنِي نَافِعٌ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عُمَرَ، قَالَ تَفْضُلُهَا بِسَبْعٍ وَعِشْرِينَ دَرَجَةً‏.‏

al.text: Transmeton Abdullah ibn Omeri: Namazi me xhemat është njëzet e shtatë shkallë më i lartë (sesa namazi që falet vetëm).

en.text: The reward of the congregational prayer is twenty seven times greater (than that of the prayer offered by a person alone).
